message:
feat(fnp-python): conformance_angle.rs harness (4 tests, 54 cases)

Tests native angle conversion functions against NumPy oracle:
- degrees: 25 cases including pi fractions, multiples, inf/nan
- radians: 25 cases including common angles (30, 45, 60, 90, etc)
- Roundtrip test: degrees(radians(x)) preserves values
- Empty array edge cases for both functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
